title: 《医学心悟》公共底本与转录校勘见证

retrieval.method: HTTP GET with redirects and a browser-compatible user agent; Wikisource was read through its public MediaWiki parse API
retrieval.hashMeaning: SHA256 and bytes identify the exact HTML or JSON response retrieved for this audit; dynamic pages may produce a different response hash later.
retrieval.archivalBoundary: Only transformed metadata and short public-domain passage witnesses are stored here; fetched HTML, JSON, and scans remain outside the repository.

witnesses.supports: Identifies 程国彭 as author and the aligned image source as the 《庄兆祥教授知足书室藏书》 copy.
witnesses.excerpt: 作者：程国彭；版本：《庄兆祥教授知足书室藏书》本
witnesses.limitations: The public transcription is OCR-aligned but still contains blank or corrupted characters; the index metadata does not itself resolve individual readings.

witnesses.locator: 卷四·自汗盗汗；卷四·产后将护法
witnesses.supports: Confirms that the public OCR transcription shares the local blank after 人参 and the blank after 常以手从心; those gaps therefore cannot validate an inserted character by themselves.
witnesses.excerpt: 人参、 、术；常以手从心 至脐下
witnesses.limitations: Used as error-propagation evidence, not as support for the missing characters.

witnesses.supports: Independently exposes a full public transcription but repeats 喜冷冻饮料食 and the same missing characters found in the local file.
witnesses.excerpt: 喜冷冻饮料食；人参、 、术；常以手从心 至脐下
witnesses.limitations: Because the same corruption is repeated, this is not an independent character-level witness for those readings.

witnesses.locator: 清經綸堂本（香港中文大學圖書館掃描本）; 寒熱虛實表里陰陽辨；真心痛；自汗；產後將護法
witnesses.supports: Reads 喜冷飲食, 人參、耆、術, 或救十中之一二, and 常以手從心擀至臍下. These readings expose one local OCR insertion, two local omissions/truncations, and two reference wording problems.
witnesses.excerpt: 喜冷飲食；人參、耆、術；或救十中之一二；常以手從心擀至臍下
witnesses.limitations: An edited transcription tied to an identified scan, not a diplomatic facsimile transcription. Character-level corrections remain edition-specific until the scan is independently inspected.
